title: Laravel Fundamentals
description: Learn the basics of Laravel framework including routing, controllers, models, and more.

lessons.title: Introduction to Laravel
lessons.description: Understand what Laravel is and why you should use it
lessons.content: Laravel is a popular PHP web framework that makes building web applications easier and faster.

lessons.description: How to install Laravel and set up your development environment
lessons.content: Learn how to install Laravel using Composer and configure your environment.

categories.title: Core Concepts

lessons.title: Routing
lessons.content: Routes are the entry points to your application. Learn how to define and manage routes.

lessons.title: Controllers

lessons.content: Controllers handle the logic of your application and process requests.
